panels.title: $application — JVM Heap Memory Used by Pool

panels.description:
Connections currently in use for outbound requests to mock-backend.

- Blocking (Apache HttpClient5): httpclient.pool.active
- Reactive (Reactor Netty): reactor.netty.connection.provider.active.connections
panels.title: $application — Active Outbound Connections

panels.description:
Connections sitting idle in the pool, available for reuse.

- Blocking: httpclient.pool.idle
- Reactive: reactor.netty.connection.provider.idle.connections
panels.title: $application — Idle Outbound Connections

panels.description:
Requests WAITING for a free connection from the pool.

Non-zero values indicate the connection pool is saturated — requests are queuing.
This is the key metric to detect the HTTP/1.1 serial keep-alive bottleneck.

- Blocking: httpclient.pool.pending
- Reactive: reactor.netty.connection.provider.pending.connections
panels.title: $application — Pending Outbound Requests (Connection Queue)

panels.description: Current snapshot of the outbound connection pool state.
panels.title: $application — Connection Pool Summary

panels.description:
Active connections / Max connections × 100.
High utilization means the pool is near capacity and requests may be queuing.
panels.title: $application — Pool Utilization (%)
